caption: A man with a short-cropped haircut and a dark beard is seated in a recording studio, positioned in front of a gray acoustic foam wall. He wears large black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a circular logo with the text "stay realistic". A professional silver microphone on a shock mount is positioned directly in front of him. As the scene progresses, the man gestures with his right hand raised and open, moving it slightly as he speaks. His facial expression shifts from an open-mouthed, surprised look to a more neutral, closed-mouth expression as he looks slightly off-camera to his left. The camera remains stationary, focusing on his upper body and head throughout the sequence.
